message:
feat(polyfills): add IPC, HTTP trailers, macOS memory, Map/Set comparison

Phase 12 polyfill improvements:

- Child process IPC: socketpair, ipc_write, ipc_read, close_fd native
  functions with fork() integration for parent-child messaging
- HTTP trailers: addTrailers() method on ServerResponse with chunked
  encoding support
- macOS memory usage: process.memoryUsage() now returns non-zero values
  using mach_task_basic_info API
- deepStrictEqual: proper Map and Set comparison by iterating entries
  and comparing values with deep equality
